title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kaido, Big Mom as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: really, what kind of idiots were those...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think they'd sink the sunny with those puny bombs! So naive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This ship is made from "Adam wood", it's the ship that will sail a thousand seas!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It took us a while to fix up the sails!! Sorry about that kin'emon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So the plan failed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kimemon, everyone, we're here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: kin-!! The situation is a bit different to what I had heard,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All those allies we gathered don't seem to be here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I can destroy that battleship for now, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where are the 3500 men from the prisoner mines!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Not here, it seems.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There should be 200 Yakuza from all over Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were 200 men from Inuarashi's firing squad at Port Itach!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and another 280 from the atamayama thieves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We fixed up dozens of ships with those guys,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I thought they were coming here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And all those weapons we were bringing from Ringo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To supply everyone....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Was there some kind of trouble!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Forgive me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our plan has been completely leaked to the enemy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WhaaaaA AAA--!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't know what happened to everyone else either!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No way....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We don't know the details either!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though we failed to destroy that lion ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We sunk all the ships that were docked at Port Itachi last night!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We even destroyed the great bridges...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That connects to the country- side under Master Orochi's orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why not a single one of them is showing up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if one of them unexpectedly found their way here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: without any ships they have no way of landing on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they miss this chance today, there will never be another one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All you rebels will be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Slowly and painfully massaced starting tomorrow!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also I'd hate to rub salt in the wound, but today's banquet will celebrate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The official alliance between the beast pirates and the big mom pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Big mom and Kaido!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: An alliance between emperors!?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Big mom...!!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
